text.title: Renovate Auto-Merge + AI Handoff Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to wire Renovate + agent handoff end-to-end.

step.name: install-renovate
step.action: Install Mend Renovate app on the repo; enable Merge-Confidence.

step.name: author-renovate-json
step.action: Commit `renovate.json` with `extends`, two `packageRules` (patch/minor + major), `vulnerabilityAlerts`, and the 0.x guard rule.
step.decision-gate: If team rejects auto-merge entirely, STOP — methodology does not apply.

step.name: add-handoff-workflow
step.action: Add `dependabot-agent-handoff.yml` that listens for `pull_request.labeled` events and assigns the PR to the chosen agent (`copilot-swe-agent` / Claude / Codex / Devin).

step.name: branch-protection
step.action: Make Renovate's CI checks required for merge; allow Renovate bot to bypass code-owner reviews on patch + minor.

step.name: validate-config
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-renovate-ai-handoff.py --file renovate.json` to confirm schema + forbidden patterns.
